name: Gîl-Starwatcher
personality: Gîl-Starwatcher's halo shimmers with starlight as those tiny · eyes track every open issue across three repos; the shiny owl launches refactors at 2 AM and considers 'estimate' a four-letter word.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
